summary: Iteration 173 - Testing Mira chat duplicate message fix and mobile footer AI disclaimer. All tests PASSED. No duplicate messages detected in /mira page. Mobile footer AI disclaimer is visible.
critical_code_review_comments: MiraPage.jsx: Unified sendMessage function (line 280) correctly handles both manual input and preset messages with single setMessages calls - no duplicates possible
Footer.jsx: Mobile AI disclaimer added at lines 196-203 with Sparkles icon, text 'Mira is powered by AI and can make mistakes', and 'Learn more' link
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mira chat duplicate message bug is FIXED. Mobile footer AI disclaimer is working. MiraChatWidget also working correctly.

mira_page_send_message.details: Sent test message 'Hello Mira, how are you?' - exactly 2 new messages added (user + assistant). No duplicates.

mira_page_second_message.details: Sent second test message 'What services do you offer?' - exactly 2 new messages added. No duplicates.

mira_page_response_quality.details: Mira responded with detailed list of 14 pillars/services. Response was relevant and helpful.

mobile_footer_ai_disclaimer.details: Mobile viewport (390x844) shows AI disclaimer: 'Mira is powered by AI and can make mistakes.' with Sparkles icon and 'Learn more' link.

mira_chat_widget.details: Widget opens from 'Ask Mira' button. Sent message 'Hello, can you help me?' - received proper response. No duplicates.

duplicate_messages_bug.fix: Consolidated two conflicting sendMessage functions (handlePresetMessage and sendMessage) into single unified sendMessage function at line 280. Function accepts optional presetMessage parameter. Single setMessages call for user message (line 293) and single setMessages call for assistant response (line 337).
duplicate_messages_bug.test_result: Multiple messages sent, each resulted in exactly 2 new messages (user + assistant). No duplicates observed.

mobile_ai_disclaimer_missing.fix: Added AI disclaimer section in mobile layout with Sparkles icon, disclaimer text, and Learn more link.
mobile_ai_disclaimer_missing.test_result: Disclaimer visible on mobile viewport at bottom of footer.

screenshots: .screenshots/mira_page_initial.png - Initial Mira page with welcome message
.screenshots/mira_second_test.png - After sending second message with detailed response
